TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mudan Mudan gu icuwa i Pingtung. ala atjunangn mapuljat 173.85 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 78.01 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 67.38 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 4,619 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 1,806 a daceneqlan, Puyuma, Amis (93%) a maqcuwa caucau. mudan aicu a mudan(penaywanan: sinvaudjan)i pasakacedas a navalj tua qakaw tua taiwan, nakidekes tua sisigu, daren i taitu, a i tjaikacedas mavan a taipingyan, a i tjaikaledep mavananga a , a i pasanavalj izua a sevangecul, mavan a guciu a tjaljanavalj a gadu a kacalisiyan. azua a "sineljavakan i sinvaudjan "nu 1878 a cavilj a imaza a guciu. nu 1920 a cavilj, aicu a mudan a pinaljavak na sihu nua ripun tua ťęėťõĄŚ∑ěśĀÜśė•ťÉ°.qaw, nu paljavak a sihu nua chuguku ta taiwan a imaza, teveljen aza qinaljan imaza, saka masan ta aicu a guciu. aicu a mudan i śĀÜśė•ŚćäŚ≥∂, a nakitangez ta gadu i cadja, kinamamamawan tua vavavan nua gadu a mavan a nekanga a kuzulj a vavavan a maru tadjekuacan. izuazua a pana a ÁČ°šłĻ,pana a Ś•≥šĽć,pana a ÁęĻÁ§ĺ. izuazua a amizuku uta. paljavak tua atjunang matja 6 qinaljan i Mudan. matja 8 qinaljan imaza, Maljipa , Sinevaudjan , Macaran(śó≠śĶ∑ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Kus kus , Pungudan , Kapanan , Anteng , Draki . likisi aicu a mudan nua sinvaudjan kata kuskus kasicuayan. nu 1874 a cavilj, kiqeci a siha na ripun ta taiwan, masa qineci ta ripun a cawcaw na kacalisiyan nu 1871 a cavilj. aicu a mavan a "sineljavakan i sinvaudjan ". qaw, sinanpazangal taimaza na sihu a śłÖŚĽ∑. venaday taimza na sihu nua ripun: tjaqaciljai ,tucu a mudan a . Sinvaudjan ,tucu a mudan a . Kuskus ,tuca a mudan aťęėŚ£ęśĚĎ. Macaren ,tucu a mudan aśó≠śĶ∑śĚĎ. Padriyiur ,tucu aśĽŅŚ∑ěťĄČ padriyiur /bunsili ,ljaviyaviya . Śõõśěóś†ľ,tucu a mudan aŚõõśěóśĚĎŚõõśěó,Ťôéť†≠. aicu a unem a qinaljan, pinaljavak tuaťęėťõĄŚ∑ěśĀÜśė•ťÉ°nu 1920 a cavilj, qaw neka a Ť°óŚļĄ.sa pungadan a "śĀÜśė•šłčŤēÉ". nu pakavilji a masanmusalj a makaqeci sekacawan, masa a "sineljavakan i sinvaudjan " kata liaw a raculju imaza, sa pungadan aťęėťõĄÁł£ÁČ°šłĻťĄČ taimaza. nu 1950 a cavilj, pinaljavak na qakaw. sa venaday aÁČ°šłĻśĚĎ ta śĚĪśļźśĚĎnu 1956 a cavilj. ka 1969 a cavilj, pinaljavak a ŚÖęÁĎ§ naśĽŅŚ∑ěťĄČťē∑ś®āśĚĎtucu. sepaljavak mavaday a Aicu a guciu tua unem a mula: Áü≥ťĖÄśĚĎ:(tjaqaciljai (sinvaudjan śĖįšŅĚŚįá/ (macaren ÁČ°šłĻÁĀ£) ťęėŚ£ęśĚĎ ŚõõśěóśĚĎ tatuluan izua tjelu a gakku a kedrikedri imaza i sinvaudjan(mudan gu). kivangavangan sipacacikelan palidring a djalan palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 26 a palidring a djalan na taiwan palidring a djalan na qakaw sikamasan 199 a palidring a djalan na qakaw sikamasan 199-A a palidring a djalan na qakaw sikamasan 156 a palidring a djalan na qakaw sikamasan 172 a palidring a djalan na qakaw
S.PHON: mudan mudan gu i ¶uwa i piŇčtuŇč. a…≠a a ¶unaŇčn mapu éat ***.** km* (ma Ē…≠inpan a ¶unaŇč **.** km*, ma Ē…≠inau…≠…ô a ¶unaŇč **.** km*). a…≠a ¶au ¶au mapu éat *,*** ¶au ¶au, a…≠a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an mapu éat *,*** a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an, pujuma, amis (**%) a maq ¶uwa ¶au ¶au. mudan ai ¶u a mudan(p…ônajwanan: sinvau…Čan)i pasaka ¶…ôdas a nava é tua qakaw tua taiwan, nakid…ôk…ôs tua sisigu, dar…ôn i taitu, a i ¶aika ¶…ôdas mavan a taipiŇčjan, a i ¶aika…≠…ôd…ôp mavanaŇča a , a i pasanava é izua a s…ôvaŇč…ô ¶u…≠, mavan a gu ¶iu a ¶a éanava é a gadu a ka ¶a…≠isijan. azua a "sin…ô éavakan i sinvau…Čan "nu **** a ¶avi é a imaza a gu ¶iu. nu **** a ¶avi é, ai ¶u a mudan a pina éavak na sihu nua ripun tua ******.qaw, nu pa éavak a sihu nua ¶huguku ta taiwan a imaza, t…ôv…ô é…ôn aza qina éan imaza, saka masan ta ai ¶u a gu ¶iu. ai ¶u a mudan i ****, a nakitaŇč…ôz ta gadu i ¶a…Ča, kinamamamawan tua vavavan nua gadu a mavan a n…ôkaŇča a kuzu é a vavavan a maru ta…Č…ôkua ¶an. izuazua a pana a **,pana a **,pana a **. izuazua a amizuku uta. pa éavak tua a ¶unaŇč ma ¶a * qina éan i mudan. ma ¶a * qina éan imaza, ma éipa , sin…ôvau…Čan , ma ¶aran(** **), kus kus , puŇčudan , kapanan , ant…ôŇč , …Ėaki . …≠ikisi ai ¶u a mudan nua sinvau…Čan kata kuskus kasi ¶uajan. nu **** a ¶avi é, kiq…ô ¶i a siha na ripun ta taiwan, masa qin…ô ¶i ta ripun a ¶aw ¶aw na ka ¶a…≠isijan nu **** a ¶avi é. ai ¶u a mavan a "sin…ô éavakan i sinvau…Čan ". qaw, sinanpazaŇča…≠ taimaza na sihu a **. v…ônadaj taimza na sihu nua ripun: ¶aqa ¶i éai ,tu ¶u a mudan a . sinvau…Čan ,tu ¶u a mudan a . kuskus ,tu ¶a a mudan a***. ma ¶ar…ôn ,tu ¶u a mudan a***. pa…Ėijiur ,tu ¶u a*** pa…Ėijiur /bunsi…≠i , éavijavija . ***,tu ¶u a mudan a*****,**. ai ¶u a un…ôm a qina éan, pina éavak tua******nu **** a ¶avi é, qaw n…ôka a **.sa puŇčadan a "****". nu pakavi éi a masanmusa é a makaq…ô ¶i s…ôka ¶awan, masa a "sin…ô éavakan i sinvau…Čan " kata …≠iaw a ra ¶u éu imaza, sa puŇčadan a****** taimaza. nu **** a ¶avi é, pina éavak na qakaw. sa v…ônadaj a*** ta ***nu **** a ¶avi é. ka **** a ¶avi é, pina éavak a ** na******tu ¶u. s…ôpa éavak mavadaj a ai ¶u a gu ¶iu tua un…ôm a mu…≠a: ***:( ¶aqa ¶i éai (sinvau…Čan ***/ (ma ¶ar…ôn ***) *** *** tatu…≠uan izua ¶…ô…≠u a gakku a k…ô…Ėik…ô…Ėi imaza i sinvau…Čan(mudan gu). kivaŇčavaŇčan sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na qakaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na qakaw sikamasan ***-a a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na qakaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na qakaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na qakaw
